Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.animation

Class FlixelAnimationController

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.animation.FlixelAnimationController
All Implemented Interfaces:
FlixelUpdatable
public class FlixelAnimationController extends Object implements FlixelUpdatable
Playback state and clip registration for FlixelSprite animations. Obtain a controller with FlixelSprite.ensureAnimation() (or assign one directly), then call sprite.ensureAnimation().loadSparrowFrames(...), .playAnimation(...), etc. Decouples animation timing from rendering and physics.

    Field
    Description
    final @NotNull FlixelSignal<FlixelAnimationFrameSignalData>
    onAnimationFinished
    Dispatched once when a non-looping clip reaches its end, or when looping is turned off at end.
    final @NotNull FlixelSignal<FlixelAnimationFrameSignalData>
    onFrameChanged
    Dispatched when the visible keyframe index changes.

  • Constructor Details

    • FlixelAnimationController

      public FlixelAnimationController(@NotNull @NotNull FlixelSprite owner)
      Creates a new animation controller for the given sprite.
      Parameters:
      owner - The sprite that owns this animation controller.

  • Method Details

    • getOwner

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSprite getOwner()
      The sprite that owns this controller. Package use includes spritemap loading helpers.

    • loadSpritemapFromJson

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSprite loadSpritemapFromJson(@NotNull @NotNull String textureKey, @NotNull @NotNull String spritemapJsonPath, @NotNull @NotNull String animationJsonPath)
      Adobe/CreateJS spritemap plus animation index JSON. See FlixelSpritemapJsonLoader.load(me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.animation.FlixelAnimationController, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String) for file shapes.
      Parameters:
      textureKey - Asset key of the already-enqueued FlixelGraphic.
      spritemapJsonPath - Path resolved like other assets (internal or classpath).
      animationJsonPath - JSON with an animations object.
      Returns:
      The owning sprite for chaining.

    • loadSparrowFrames

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSprite loadSparrowFrames(@NotNull @NotNull String textureKey, @NotNull @NotNull String xmlPath)
      Loads Sparrow XML from a path string (UTF-8). Tries Gdx.files.internal then classpath.
      Parameters:
      textureKey - Asset key of the FlixelGraphic.
      xmlPath - Path to Sparrow XML (e.g. "data/hero.xml").
      Returns:
      The owning sprite for chaining.

    • loadSparrowFrames

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSprite loadSparrowFrames(@NotNull @NotNull String textureKey, @NotNull @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.files.FileHandle xmlFile)
      Parameters:
      textureKey - Asset key of the FlixelGraphic.
      xmlFile - Sparrow XML file, read as UTF-8 (optional BOM stripped)
      Returns:
      The owning sprite for chaining.

    • loadSparrowFrames

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSprite loadSparrowFrames(@NotNull @NotNull String textureKey, @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.utils.XmlReader.Element xmlRoot)
      Parses Sparrow SubTexture entries and installs the result on the owner.
      Parameters:
      textureKey - Asset key of the FlixelGraphic.
      xmlRoot - Root XML element (e.g. from XmlReader.parse(FileHandle)).
      Returns:
      The owning sprite for chaining.

      public void reverse()
      Toggles playback direction. Time still advances by update(float) while not paused.

    • addAnimationByPrefix

      public void addAnimationByPrefix(@NotNull @NotNull String name, @NotNull @NotNull String prefix, int frameRate, boolean loop)
      Adds an animation to the controller by prefixing the frame names.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the animation.
      prefix - The prefix of the frame names.
      frameRate - The frame rate of the animation.
      loop - Whether the animation should loop.

    • addAnimationFromAtlas

      public void addAnimationFromAtlas(@NotNull @NotNull String name, @NotNull @org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull int[] atlasFrameIndices, float frameDuration, boolean loop)
      Adds a clip from the current atlas list FlixelSprite.getAtlasRegions() using zero-based indices into that list. Used by spritemap JSON and by games that know frame order after a Sparrow or spritemap load.
      Parameters:
      name - Clip name for playAnimation(String).
      atlasFrameIndices - Indices into the atlas list (out-of-range entries are skipped).
      frameDuration - libGDX frame duration in seconds (reciprocal of FPS).
      loop - Whether the clip loops.

    • addAnimation

      public void addAnimation(@NotNull @NotNull String name, int[] frameIndices, float frameDuration)
      Adds an animation to the controller by specifying the frame indices.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the animation.
      frameIndices - The indices of the frames to add.
      frameDuration - The duration of each frame.

    • playAnimation

      public void playAnimation(@NotNull @NotNull String name)
      Plays the animation with the given name. Loops and restarts the animation by default.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the animation to play.

    • playAnimation

      public void playAnimation(@NotNull @NotNull String name, boolean loop)
      Plays the animation with the given name. Restarts the animation by default.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the animation to play.
      loop - Whether the animation should loop.

    • playAnimation

      public void playAnimation(@NotNull @NotNull String name, boolean loop, boolean forceRestart)
      Plays the animation with the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the animation to play.
      loop - Whether the animation should loop.
      forceRestart - Whether the animation should restart.

    • getAnimations

    • getStateTime

      public float getStateTime()

    • getCurrentAnim

      @NotNull public @NotNull String getCurrentAnim()

    • getCurrentKeyframeIndex

      public int getCurrentKeyframeIndex()
      Zero-based key index in the current clip. Computed from getStateTime() and the controller's looping flag rather than from the underlying libGDX Animation's PlayMode, so the index always matches what update(float) actually displays no matter how the clip was registered.

      For non-looping playback that has already finished, this returns the last keyframe index (keyframeCount - 1). For looping playback, it returns the wrapped index inside [0, keyframeCount). Useful for multi-part BTA/texture-atlas characters driven outside a single-frame texture (for example FlixelAnimateSprite).

      Returns:
      The current keyframe index. Always >= 0.

    • isLooping

      public boolean isLooping()
